rationale.root_cause: They did not name a global_buffer_overflow at the expected line 11 and incorrectly described it as overwriting the stack. Although they identified strcpy on argv data, the misclassification and lack of the required term fail the criterion.
rationale.local_fix: They proposed strncpy/strlcpy with null-termination but did not reject overlong input before copying. The criterion requires explicit length validation and rejection, not just truncation.
rationale.global_fix: They recommended forbidding raw strcpy/strcat and using bounded string APIs across the codebase, which removes unbounded string handling from the data path. This matches the global fix requirement.
